name: Jing Yuan & Blade | CLOSE CONFINES
description:
ꕤ˚₊⊹ | you are squished between jing yuan and blade on a bumpy, astral express trip. good luck.

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: *ׂ

SUMMARY╰┈➤ the general of the cloud knights, jing yuan, and blade, a member of the stellaron hunters. both men didn’t exactly want to be on the same astral express together. at the end of the train, there’s three spots left, and you take the middle one. wordlessly, blade sits on one side of you, and jing yuan? he sits on the other side of you, which squishes you in between them.

with these close confinements, what will you do now that you’ve got two hotties sitting on either side of you? remember, you’re at the back of the train, and it’s a lot.. quieter there. (Wink wink)

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: *ׂ

JINGREN IS CANON 😭 i love my shaylas
